snippet.title: Rama | Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana | Nitesh Tiwari | Ranbir, Yash, Hans Zimmer & A.R. Rahman
snippet.description:
Rama is the greatest of all time because he lived a life where the choices he made were always in the benefit of the greater good, duty over desire, and sacrifice over self. 

His legacy continues to enhance and empower humanity over time and bring the belief in the goodness of the human spirit to resolve all conflict and bring peace to the world. 

Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana 
Directed by Nitesh Tiwari 

In cinemas worldwide
Ramayana Part 1 🏹
Diwali 2026

---------------------------------------------------

Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana
Our Truth. Our History.

Starring: 
Ranbir Kapoor as Rama 
Yash as Ravana 
Sai Pallavi as Sita 
Ravie Dubey as Lakshman 
Sunny Deol as Hanuman

Co-Produced by Yash
Adapted for Screenplay by Shridhar Raghavan & Nitesh Tiwari.
Directed by Nitesh Tiwari

Music by Hans Zimmer & A.R. Rahman
Lyrics by Kumar Vishwas

VFX by DNEG (8-time Academy Award winner)

Filmed for IMAX

Presented by Prime Focus Studios in association with Monster Mind Creations

Audio on Sony Music Entertainment India Pvt. Ltd (C) 2026

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla -Official Trailer| Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 16 Apr
snippet.description:
Welcome to Bhooth Bangla. Yahan na toh log normal hain... Aur upar se Bangla bhi paranormal hai. 
Enter at your own risk 🧟‍♀️

#BhoothBanglaTrailer out now

#BhoothBangla, paid previews begin in theatres 16th April 2026, 9 PM onwards 👻

When London-returned Arjun Acharya arrives in the sleepy town of Mangalpur to host his sister’s wedding at his newly inherited ancestral palace, he finds himself caught in a whirlwind of terrified locals, bizarre ghostly happenings, and hilarious chaos—until he begins uncovering the shocking truth behind the palace’s centuries-old legend.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present
Bhooth Bangla

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Jisshu Sengupta, Manoj Joshi, Mithila Palkar, Asrani Ji, Rajesh Sharma 
Directed by: Priyadarshan
Produced by: Akshay Kumar, Shobha Kapoor, Ektaa R. Kapoor
Co-producer: Vimal Doshi, Faara Sheikh, Vedant Vikaas Baali
Group CEO & CFO (BTL): Sanjay Dwivedi
Director of Photography: Divakar Mani
Story by: Aakash Kaushik
Screenplay by: Priyadarshan, Rohan Shankar, Abilash Nair
Dialogues by: Rohan Shankar
Music: Pritam
Lyrics: Yitendra Mishra & Kumaar
Co-Director: Abilash Nair
Editor: Aiyappan Nair M.S
Line Producers: Suresh Balaji & George Pius
Costume Designers: V Sai Babu, Dhanya Balakrishnan, Veera Kapur, Rimple & Harpreet
Sound Designers: Rajakrishnan & Shahaab Alam
Background Score: Ronnie Raphael
DI: Sri Sarathi Studios
DI Colorist: Vishnuvardhan
VFX: WRC Studio LLP
VFX Supervisor: Sidharth Priyadarshan
Production Designer: Sabu Cyril
Director of Choreography: Pony Verma, Ganesh Acharya
Group Commercial Head (BTL): Hamavvand Chwda
Head of Marketing (BTL): Raveena S Deshpaande
Post Production Head (BTL): Manohar Pandya
VP Licensing and Syndication (BTL): Ankit Chauhan
Commercial Head (BTL): Mitesh Bilakhia
Executive Producer: Pooja Tiwari Angarish
Publicity Designer: House of Awe
Media Consultant: Spice
Digital Agency: Everymedia
Visual Promotions: Just Right Studioz NX

#ZeeMusicCompany #PenMovies

snippet.title: 250,000 UC X-SUIT OPENING🔝 | JONATHAN IS BACK!!🖤 | BGMI!
snippet.description:
Hey Guys, I’m Jonathan Amaral, better known as Jonathan Gaming, a professional BGMI esports athlete and streamer.

Since the start of my journey, my dedication to the game has been defined by precision, consistency, and an unstoppable grind. As an assaulter, I’ve built a reputation for clutch performances and high-impact gameplay, earning respect in the BGMI community. 

Through years of dedication, I’ve honed my skills, adapting to every challenge and evolving with the game. Whether in high-stakes tournaments or streaming for the gaming community, my focus remains the same - pushing the limits and delivering top-tier gameplay.

Redbull Athlete 🧢
BGIS 2025 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2025 Finals MVP 👑
BMPS 2024 2nd Runner up 🥉
BGMS 2022 MVP 🏆
BGMS 2022 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2021 Overall Top Fragger 🎯
PMWL #2 Overall Fragger 💣
PMCO Globals #4 Fragger 💣
PMPL 2020 Finals #2 Fragger 🎯
PMPL 2020 Finals Runner up 🥈
PMIS 2020 Top Fragger 🎯
PMIS 2020 India Champions 🏆
PMCO 2019 Fall Split SA Champion 🏆


 Follow Me & Stay Connected! 
📷 Instagram - @ig_jonathangaming
💬 Discord - https://discord.gg/jonathan
📺 YouTube - https://www.youtube.com/@JONATHANGAMINGYT/
🐦 Twitter - @ig_jonathan16

🎮 Join the #JonathanArmy & Be Part of the Esports Revolution! 🎮
💖 Like, Share & Subscribe for More Epic Content! 💖

#JONATHANISLIVE #JONATHANBGMI #JONATHANGAMING #ESPORTS #BGMIINDIA #GAMING #LIVESTREAM

snippet.title: Patriot Malayalam Trailer | Mammootty | Mohanlal | Mahesh Narayanan | Anto Joseph
snippet.description:
From Anto Joseph Productions, the banner behind some of the most acclaimed and celebrated films in recent times, and visionary filmmaker Mahesh Narayanan, comes the official trailer of Patriot.
Featuring an ensemble of legends: Mammootty, Mohanlal, Fahadh Faasil, Kunchacko Boban, Nayanthara, and Revathy.

Written & Directed by: Mahesh Narayanan
Produced by: Anto Joseph, K. G. Anil Kumar
Co-Produced by: C. R. Saleem, Subhash George Manuel
Music & Original Score: Sushin Shyam
Director of Photography: Manush Nandan ISC
Executive Producers: C. V. Sarathi, Rajesh Krishna
Edited by: Mahesh Narayanan, Rahul Radhakrishnan
Production Design: Shajie Naduvil, Jibin Jacob
Audiography: Vishnu Govind
Sync Sound: Vaisakh P. V.
Production Controller: Dixon Poduthas
Line Producers:
Sunil Singh, Niroop Pinto, Justin Boban, Jeswin Boban
Makeup: Ranjith Ambady
Lyrics: Anwar Ali, Vinayak Sasikumar
Action Directors:
Dhilip Subbarayan, Stunt Silva, Mafia Sasi, Riyaz - Habib, Mahesh Mathew
Costume Design: Dhanya Balakrishnan

snippet.description:

Additional Production: Sayantan Guha
Music Label - T-Series

Lyrics:
Janeman, Janeman, Janeman
Jayega tu kahan
Tu hai Noor e Nazar meri
Dil mera tujh pe fidha

Janeman, Janeman, Janeman
Jayega tu kahan
Tu hai Noor e Nazar meri
Dil mera tujh pe fidha

Takrayenge mehfil mein
To hogi guftagoo
Tujhe dikhla doongi taare
Jab honge rubaroo

Takrayenge mehfil mein
To hogi guftagoo
Tujhe dikhla doongi taare
Jab honge rubaroo

Mein aur Tu
Mein aur Tu
Me and you
Mein aur Tu

Can you catch a glimpse of my love, baby?
I want so much more of your touch baby
Give me sweet romance, throw a glance at me
Come close we’ll throw hands,
we can dance baby.

Can you catch a glimpse of my love, baby?
I want so much more of that touch lately
Give me sweet romance,
Throw a glance at me.
Come close we’ll throw ha   Pyaase lab hai tere

Dil mein dariya mere
Ah kinare pe do pal thehar ja zara

Tham geya hai sama
Meri baahon mein ah
Ah dikha doon tujhe mein muqamal jahan

Jayega tu kahan
Tu hai Noor e Nazar meri
Dil mera tujh pe fidha

Jayega tu kahan
Tu hai Noor e Nazar meri
Dil mera tujh pe fidha

Takrayenge mehfil mein
To hogi guftagoo
Tujhe dikhla doongi taare
Jab honge rubaroo

Takrayenge mehfil mein
To hogi guftagoo
Tujhe dikhla doongi taare
Jab honge rubaroo

Ranjit Bawa is one of the most loved names in Punjabi music, known for his powerful voice and hit Punjabi songs like Jatt Di Akal, Yaari Chandigarh Waliye, and his consistently trending new Punjabi songs that connect with the youth and Punjabi desi audience alike.

Whether you’re into the latest Punjabi songs, searching for a new Ranjit Bawa song, or looking for a trending Punjabi hit, this song is all set to become your next favorite. From its engaging melody to its high-energy vibe, Akh Mastani is made to be played on repeat.
Turn up the volume, feel the vibe, and get ready for Akh Mastani to take over your playlist. 🎶

ye stream bilkul miss nahi karna!

* 3 Ride Modes – Rain, Road, Sports

🎮 Stream Highlights
🔥 OP spray transfers
🔥 High-intensity BGMI gameplay
🔥 Bike feature breakdown in Spower style
🔥 Chat vibes always on top
Test ride link pinned hai — check zaroor karna!

BROWN STRING RECORDS & IK TARA STUDIOS PRESENTS

snippet.title: Raja Shivaji Teaser: Chhaava शी तुलना, Riteish Deshmukh Look चर्चेत, राजा शिवाजी सिनेमा गाजणार का ?
snippet.description:
#BolBhidu #RajaShivaji #RitieshDeshmukh

नाम के आगे राजा लगाने से कोई राजा नही बनता, संजय दत्तचा खर्जातला आवाज येतो आणि त्यानंतर स्क्रीनवर पहिल्यांदा संजय दत्तच दिसतो, पण खऱ्या अर्थाने हिट होतो संजय दत्तचा दुसरा डायलॉग, मराठो के मुकद्दर में या तो मौत लिखी है या फिर गुलामी, रितेश देशमुखच्या राजा शिवाजी या पिक्चरच्या टीझरमधला हा सिन. टिझरमध्ये आऊसाहेब जिजाऊ दिसतात, अफझलखान दिसतो, बडी  बेगम दिसते, सईबाई राणीसाहेब दिसतात आणि छत्रपती शिवाजी महाराजांच्या भूमिकेत दिसतो रितेश देशमुख. राजा शिवाजी या पिक्चरची प्रचंड चर्चा होती, पिक्चरची स्टोरी, ट्रिओलॉजी, कोण कुणाचा रोल करणार अशा अनेक गोष्टी चर्चेत होत्या, त्यात धुरंधर-२ सोबत काही थिएटर्समध्ये टिझर रिलीझ झाला, पण जेव्हा हा टीझर युट्युबवर आला, तेव्हा मात्र मिक्स्ड रिऍक्शन आल्या, अनेकांनी राजा शिवाजीची तुलना छावाशी केली, कुणी कौतुक केलं, कुणी टीका केली, पण यात एक प्रश्न उभा राहिला छावाला जमलं ते राजा शिवाजी सिनेमाला जमेल का ? पाहुयात या व्हिडीओमधून.. 

चॅनेलला सबस्क्राईब करायला विसरू नका. नोटिफिकेशन चालू ठेवा म्हणजे लेटेस्ट व्हिडीओचे नोटिफिकेशन तुम्हाला मिळत राहतील. 
https://www.youtube.com/@BolBhidu

✒️ आपणही आपले लेख, विषय व इतर माहिती आम्हाला bolbhidu1@gmail.com या मेल आयडीवर पाठवू शकता. 

Connect With Us On🔎

➡️ Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/​BolBhiduCOM
➡️ Twitter : https://twitter.com/bolbhidu
➡️ Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/bolbhidu
➡️Website: https://bolbhidu.com/

चॅनेलला सबस्क्राईब करायला विसरू नका. नोटिफिकेशन चालू ठेवा म्हणजे लेटेस्ट व्हिडीओचे नोटिफिकेशन तुम्हाला मिळत राहतील. 
https://www.youtube.com/@BolBhidu

✒️ आपणही आपले लेख, विषय व इतर माहिती आम्हाला bolbhidu1@gmail.com या मेल आयडीवर पाठवू शकता. 

Connect With Us On🔎

➡️ Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/​BolBhiduCOM
➡️ Twitter : https://twitter.com/bolbhidu
➡️ Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/bolbhidu
➡️Website: https://bolbhidu.com/

snippet.title: Dil Kehta Hai Chal Unse Mil - 4K Video Song | Kumar Sanu, Alka Yagnik | Aamir Khan, Manisha Koirala
snippet.description:
Dil Kehta Hai Chal Unse Mil - 4K Video Song | Kumar Sanu, Alka Yagnik | Aamir Khan, Manisha Koirala

Song : Dil Kehta Hai 
Singer : Kumar Sanu & Alka Yagnik
Lyrics : Majrooh Sultanpuri
Music : Anu Malik
Director : Mansoor Khan
Producer : Ratan Jain
Star Cast : Aamir Khan, Manisha Koirala.

Song Lyrics-

Dil kehta hai chal unse mil
Uthte hain kadam ruk jaate hain
Dil humko kabhi samjhaata hai
Hum dil ko kabhi samjhaate hai

Dil kehta hai chal unse mil
Uthte hain kadam ruk jaate hain
Dil humko kabhi samjhaata hai
Hum dil ko kabhi samjhaate hai

Hum jab se hain judaa
Ae mere hum nasheen
Yun dekho to mere
Daaman mein kya nahin
Daulat ka chaand hai
Shohrat ki chaandni
Magar tumhe khoke
Lage hai mujhe aisa
Ke tum nahin to kuch bhi nahin
Tum kya jaano ab hum kitna
Dil hi dil mein pachtaate hai
Dil humko kabhi samjhaata hai
Hum dil ko kabhi samjhaate hai

Voh din the kya haseen
Dono the saath mein
Aur baahein aap ki thi
Mere haath mein
Tum hi tum hai sanam
Mere din raat mein
Par itni bulandi pe
Tum ho meri jaan
Aaye na daaman ab haath mein
Paana tumko mumkin hi nahin
Soche bhi to hum ghabraate hai
Dil humko kabhi samjhaata hai
Hum dil ko kabhi samjhaate hai

Dil kehta hai chal unse mil
Uthte hain kadam
Ruk jaate hain
Uthte hain kadam
Ruk jaate hain
Uthte hain kadam
Ruk jaate hain.

snippet.title: NOSTALGIA BAIT? 🙈 | Bhooth Bangla Trailer Review | Akshay Kumar
snippet.description:
I had so many expectations from this reunion but the trailer leaves more to be desired. The movie called #bhoothbangla features #akshaykumar in the lead role and him reuniting with director #priyadarshan . The #bollywood movie gives us flashbacks to the franchise of #bhoolbhulaiya but will it be as successful? The movie stars #rajpalyadav #pareshrawal #wamiqagabbi and #tabu in prominent roles. I am genuinely curious, is this even funny? I hope you like the video on:-

snippet.description:

আমিষ খাওয়ার চেষ্টা বৃথা - সবই পন্ডশ্রম!
নীরবতা বজায় রাখতে সবাই হিমসিম...
একেন নিজেই খাচ্ছে case, সঙ্গে ঘোড়ার ডিম!

#EkenBabu - Purulia-e Pakrao: Official Trailer | Series directed by Joydeep Mukherjee, premieres 15th April, only on #hoichoi.

Anirban Chakrabarti Suhotra Mukhopadhyay Somak Ghosh Tuban Subho Pramanick Subhadeep B Guha Padmanabha Dasgupta Late Sujan Dasgupta Mahendra Soni SVF #Trailer

भोजपुरी जगत के सुपरस्टार प्रमोद प्रेमी यादव और चंदा राज का एक और धमाकेदार गाना "जान कुर्बान का देहब" अब आउट हो चुका है। इस गाने में प्यार और तकरार की एक खूबसूरत कहानी दिखाई गई है। गाने को अंत तक सुने और अपनी राय कमेंट में जरूर दें !

Subscribe करने के लिए क्लिक करें 👉 - http://goo.gl/ip2lbk

आप सब इस गाने का Reels बनाए - Make Your Reels :- https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/1276509667771624/

►Song - Jaan Kurban Ka Dehab
►Singer - Pramod Premi Yadav, Chanda Raj
►Lyrics - Ravi Yadav
►Music Director - Vikash Yadav
►Company/ Label - Wave Music 
►Digital Marketing - Social India Marketing (SIM)
►Whatsapp - 9718776677
►VG - 45310

♪ Spotify : https://open.spotify.com/track/1wPlghVk8U37nPEINtm6Vl?si=0a954ce1a7f44f75
♪ Gaana :  https://gaana.com/song/jaan-kuraban-ka-dehab
♪ Jio Saavn : https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/jaan-kurban-ka-dehab/KQVdYyRHTwM
♪ Apple Music :  https://music.apple.com/us/album/jaan-kuraban-ka-dehab-single/1889777425
♪ Amazon Prime Music : https://music.amazon.com/tracks/B0GVN7GVKL?marketplaceId=ATVPDKIKX0DER&musicTerritory=US&ref=dm_sh_2b9mE2qOblK8L2DVd1ipfNmZH
♪ YouTube Music : https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=pXdpRRyLjis&si=OuUKOZ1nwzOBjEyu
♪ Instagram Reels :  https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/1276509667771624/
♪ Spotify Playlist : https://open.spotify.com/user/31wrrqxq4vi7pg57rnkxcna4tcqu?si=eed3103487f24692

Connected with us !

👉 Follow us on Instagram :- https://www.instagram.com/wavemusic/
👉 Like us on Facebook :- https://www.facebook.com/WaveMusicIndiaofficial
👉Join Us on Whtsapp :- https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VacuoR1GpLHNjsDWYd2R
👉 Follow us on X ( Twitter ) :- https://x.com/WaveMusicWM?t=kKhpZOhFiLqswaThplIGBg&s=08 

#PramodPremiYadav #ChandaRaj #JaanKurabanKaDehab #BhojpuriSong2026 #NewBhojpuriSong #BhojpuriMusic #PramodPremiHits #LatestBhojpuri #RomanticSong #BhojpuriVideo #SuperhitBhojpuri #JanKurbanKaDehab

Lyrics - 

जय माँ सरस्वती 
            गीत रवि यादव 

F प्यार तोहसे करब हो, तोहरे प मरब हो 
   केहु कुछो कहे हम तनिको ना डरब हो 

दिल तोहरे के दान क देहब 

M कायर ना हई ई एलान क देहब 
तोहरे ला जान कुर्बान क देहब 

सबसे अलग पहचान क देहब 
तोहरे ला जान कुर्बान क देहब 

                   अन्तरा-१

F तोहके जानीले, आपन मानिले 
    बाड़ा हीरो हमार पहचानिले 

M गोरी रानी बनाके हम राखब हो 
     छोड़ी तोहरा ना दोसरा प ताकब हो 

F फेल सबकर प्लान क देहब 

M कायर ना —————————! 
    ऊँचा तोहार आन बान शान क देहब 

तोहरे—————————————!

                      अन्तरा-२

F हम लुभा गईनी , पगला गईनी 
   सुनके येतना बड़ाई शरमा गईनी 

    M  रवि प्रमोद के प्यार बा अनोखा हो 
          येहीजा सबका के मिले ना मौका हो 

F दुनिया के अंजान क देहब 

M कायर ना——————————!
     नामे तहरा दुगो मकान क देहब 

तोहरे ला———————————-!

snippet.title: सोमवार स्पेशल | भोले बाबा के भजन | Bhole Baba Ke Bhajan  | Shiv Bhajan 2026 | Bhole Bhajan
snippet.description:
सोमवार स्पेशल | भोले बाबा के भजन | Bhole Baba Ke Bhajan  | Shiv Bhajan 2026 | Bhole Bhajan

तो आईए आज पावन हृदय से इस भजन द्वारा जो मांगना है मांग लीजिए।
श्याम बाबा सबकी मनोकामनांए पूर्ण करें। 🙏

⭐#Bhajan : 
ओ भोलेनाथ तीन लोक के स्वामी
धन धन भोलेनाथ बांट दियो
भोले बाबा मैं तेरा दीवाना
कितनी सुन्दर है माँ तेरी नगरी
सिर पे गंगा जी की धार
नैनो को भोले बाबा का दीदार
भोले शंकर मेरे घर आएंगे 
शिव मेरी पूजा शिव मेरी शक्ति
शंकर भोलानाथ है हमारा तुम्हारा
ॐ मंगलम् ओमकार मंगलम्
⭐Singer : Upasana Mehta
⭐Lyrics : Traditional
⭐Music: Binny Narang (9991980610)
⭐Video: Shalini Sharma (7015960610)

localized.description:
सोमवार स्पेशल | भोले बाबा के भजन | Bhole Baba Ke Bhajan  | Shiv Bhajan 2026 | Bhole Bhajan

तो आईए आज पावन हृदय से इस भजन द्वारा जो मांगना है मांग लीजिए।
श्याम बाबा सबकी मनोकामनांए पूर्ण करें। 🙏

⭐#Bhajan : 
ओ भोलेनाथ तीन लोक के स्वामी
धन धन भोलेनाथ बांट दियो
भोले बाबा मैं तेरा दीवाना
कितनी सुन्दर है माँ तेरी नगरी
सिर पे गंगा जी की धार
नैनो को भोले बाबा का दीदार
भोले शंकर मेरे घर आएंगे 
शिव मेरी पूजा शिव मेरी शक्ति
शंकर भोलानाथ है हमारा तुम्हारा
ॐ मंगलम् ओमकार मंगलम्
⭐Singer : Upasana Mehta
⭐Lyrics : Traditional
⭐Music: Binny Narang (9991980610)
⭐Video: Shalini Sharma (7015960610)
⭐Label Bhakti Sadhna (9466651081)

snippet.description:

High on beats and attitude 💥
Ruffle Dunali blends Haryanvi and Punjabi vibes into one powerful track 🔊

Step into the sound, feel the vibe, and experience the essence of Ruffle Dunali. 🎶

🔥 Out Now on all digital platforms!

🎶 Streaming Link ;-  https://VirginMusicGroup.lnk.to/RuffleDunali

#RuffleDunali  #princenarula  #kiranbajwa   #revati   #nuraviproductions #nuraviproductionsharyanvi #newharyanvisong #newsong2026 #latestpunjabimusic #latestnewsongs 

Credits  
Song Name - Ruffle Dunali
Starring -  Prince Narula | Kiran Bajwa | Revati Mahurkar
Lyrics - Nuravi Productions
Male Rap 2 Lyrics: Udaar
Music - Axslaa
Prince Dialogue: KALAKAAR
Video by - Saibus
Choreographer : Yassh Kadamm
Asst Choreographer : Dishita Dhanuka
Project Head Nuravi productions : Jashan
Digital Distribution: Bounce Digital 

Producer :- Manu Vats Choubey
Production Label :- Nuravi Productions

-------
Lyrics 

Ho tikhe tilhe nain mere Ruffle dunali 
Ek jhatke m giniye tu bande maaru chaali...

Me chora ki re band bjan aali chori 
Mere aage chore been bjaiye mat na
Len m la dyungi tne bde re spere ne
Nagan smjh dhore aaiye mat naaaa
Ek be balkhakhdyu delhi seher n hlaa dyu
Latke kamar le  jo Choti kaali kaali 
 tikhe tilhe nain mere Ruffle dunali 
Ek jhatke m giniye tu bande maaru chaali..


Prle punjab m stich hove suit mere 
Churdiya bn aave se lahore te 
Jind ki jutti phr laagu m kasuti 
Moll nkhre ka jaaliya se crore pe 
repeat 

Phrya Koka afgaan ka 
Mascaara hai mlaan ka 
Itely  m bne mere kaana aali baali 
tikhe tilhe nain mere rafal dunali 
Ek jhatke m giniye tu bande maaru chaali..

In nainan aale vaaran n tham  tham tham 
Teri gail haseen har shaam  sham sham 
Teri aankhya ka piya tha jaam  jaam jaam 
 nshe krn ka lagya ilzaam  jaam 

Se haryane ki  bole france 
Na bne itni advance 
Tere issare ki smjhu hu sense 
Maare tu bhi to  mere pe chance" heeeen"


Ego dhrke m side meri bnjya bride 
Photo rakhu teri bhot Phone me krke n hide 
Ye gucci lv prada dekh swaad koni aanda 
Lage suit m bandook jche tere pe pranda 

Baat Maanle sach 
Jodi teri meri gach 
Chora m bhi hu top Je tu ak47 ........



47 mera waight 47 jisya luck chore 
Dekhe jave tere jisye addi chl chk chore 
Kadna je kadh kiye man m je sak chore 
Ere gere n to jma dendi konya fuck chore 

Ghalya Surmaa barood aala 
Padti  m chalu chaala 

Thodi  aala till meri krrya rukhali .....
Ho tukhe tikhe nain mere ruffle dunali 
Ek jhtke m giniye m bnde maru chali

snippet.title: मेरे तन में भी शिव मेरे मन में भी शिव | Shiv Naam Kirtan | शिव भजन | Shiv Naam Jap | Shiv Dhun |
snippet.description:
Experience the ultimate state of devotion with this soulful Shiv Bhajan, "मेरे तन में भी शिव मेरे मन में भी शिव" (Mere Tann Mein Bhi Shiv Mere Mann Mein Bhi Shiv). This song is a beautiful reminder that Mahadev is always with us, residing in our every thought and every breath.

यह शांति और साधना से भरपूर Shiv Bhajan भगवान महादेव के सर्वव्यापी स्वरूप को समर्पित है—“मेरे तन में भी शिव, मेरे मन में भी शिव।” यह Shiv Dhun मन, शरीर और आत्मा को शिव तत्व से जोड़ती है, नकारात्मक ऊर्जा को शांत करती है और गहरी आध्यात्मिक अनुभूति प्रदान करती है।

Nonstop Shiv Dhun Continuous chanting for high focus and meditation.
Shiv Naam Jap Best way to purify your thoughts.
Mere Tan Mein Bhi Shiv Mere Mann Mein Bhi Shiv The powerful lyric that inspires devotion.
Shiva The ultimate mantra for peace and happiness.

📌 Keywords: Mere Tan Mein Bhi Shiv Mere Man Mein Bhi Shiv, Shiv Bhajan, Shiv Dhun, Mahadev Bhakti, Bunty Thakur Bhajan, Shiva Meditation Song, Shiv Naam Jap, Om Namah Shivay, Powerful Shiv Dhun, Bajao Bhakti

#shivbhajan #shivnaam #shivdhun #shivbhajan #mahadev

snippet.title: Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan - मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko |
snippet.description:
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan

Song: | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan

Music & Composer: 
Singer :Bhumika Sharma 
Additional Lyrics :
Lyrics : Treditional
Music Label :Mk Bhakti Juction


Lose yourself in the sacred lanes of Vrindavan with this soulful rendition: "Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha." This Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan captures the deep desire of a devotee to become a peacock in the gardens of Nidhivan, just to be close to Radha Rani and Krishna.

मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा - वृंदावन की इस पावन धुन में खो जाएँ। Bajao Bhakti आपके लिए लेकर आया है श्री राधा-कृष्ण की महिमा का एक ऐसा भजन जो आपके हृदय को शांति और आनंद से भर देगा।

यह मधुर और भावपूर्ण Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan ब्रज की पावन भावना और राधा-कृष्ण के दिव्य प्रेम को समर्पित है।
“मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधाअपने वृंदावन को” – यह पंक्ति भक्त की उस विनम्र प्रार्थना को दर्शाती है, जहाँ वह ब्रजधाम में मोर बनकर भी राधा-कृष्ण के चरणों में रहना चाहता है।

यह भजन ध्यान, जप, सुबह-शाम की पूजा, वृंदावन भक्ति, कीर्तन और मन की शांति के लिए अत्यंत उपयुक्त है। इसकी शांत धुन और प्रेमपूर्ण शब्द आत्मा को सुकून देते हैं और मन को वृंदावन की गलियों में ले जाते हैं।

Vrindavan Essence: Experience the 'Brij Ras' from the comfort of your home.

Soulful Peace: Perfect for morning meditation or evening relaxation.

📌 Keywords: Mohe Mor Banaiyo To Banaiyo Vrindavan Ko, मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा, Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan, Vrindavan Bhajan, Radha Krishna Song 2026, Bunty Thakur Bhajan, Krishna Meditation Music, Radha Rani Bhajan, Braj Bhakti Song

#radhakrishna #radhabhajan #krishnabhajan #radharani

snippet.title: Race Gurram Re-Release Trailer 2.0 | Allu Arjun, Shruti Haasan | Surender Reddy | Thaman S
snippet.description:
The Icon of Mass is racing back! 🏎️💥

Feel the adrenaline rush once again as Race Gurram storms into theaters with a power-packed Trailer 2.0! ⚡
Get ready to witness Allu Arjun at his stylish best—faster, fiercer, and more entertaining than ever before.

Directed by the trendsetter Surender Reddy, this blockbuster blends action, comedy, and swag like never before.

From the iconic madness of Kill Bill Pandey brought to life by Brahmanandam 😂
to the sizzling chemistry with Shruti Haasan 💃
every moment is a celebration of pure entertainment!
🔥 Bigger action
🔥 Sharper style
🔥 Double the madness

This isn’t just a re-release… it’s a full-throttle comeback!

Get ready to relive the ride—Race Gurram is back to rule the big screen! 🎬💥

Subscribe to our YouTube Channel : http://bit.ly/1hE4KpS
---------------------------
🎬 MOVIE CREDITS 🎬

Movie: Race Gurram
Starring: Allu Arjun, Shruti Haasan, Shaam, Brahmanandam, Ravi Kishan, Prakash Raj
Director: Surender Reddy
Music Director: S.S. Thaman
Cinematography: Manoj Paramahamsa
Producers: Nallamalupu Srinivas (Bujji), Dr. Venkateswara Rao
Banner: Sri Lakshmi Narasimha Productions
Music Label: Lahari Music

snippet.title: Bhoot Bangla Trailer Launch LIVE: Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Priyadarshan, Wamiqa Gabbi, Rajpal & Paresh Ji
snippet.description:
Watch the LIVE Trailer Launch of this year's much awaited horror-comedy film BHOOT BANGLA starring Akshay Kumar, Wamiqa Gabbi, Tabu, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Manoj Joshi, Rajesh Sharma, Jisshu Sengupta, Mithila Palkar & others! Backed by the Balaji Telefilms Boss Ekta Kapoor & Directed by comedy king Priyadarshan the movie is all set to hit the silver screens on 17.04.26! Catch the full trailer launch telecast LIVE from Mumbai only on your favourite online digital destination, Lehren! #akshaykumar #bhootbangla #priyadarshan #bhootbanglatrailer #tabu #wamiqagabbi #pareshrawal #rajpalyadav #manojjoshi #bhootbanglateaser #rajeshsharma #jisshusengupta #mithilapalkar #live #balajitelefilmslimited 

About Lehren:
Lehren (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lehren) is a complete Entertainment News Network mainly devoted to Indian Films, Television, Celebrity Coverage, and Pop Culture. It covers a wide array of film news, reviews, interviews, celebrity life, gossip, scoops, red carpet, and trends. Lehren is the first and most widely viewed and recalled Indian Entertainment destination.
Lehren's engagement with Showbiz dates from 1987, when it introduced several film-based entertainment shows for India's then-emerging television industry. Lehren, today, has unparalleled reach across digital platforms and is a favorite destination for young, hip, and trendsetting entertainment enthusiasts.

लहरें (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lehren) एक संपूर्ण मनोरंजन न्यूज़ नेटवर्क है जो मुख्य रूप से भारतीय फिल्म, टेलीविजन जगत के साथ सेलिब्रिटी कवरेज और पॉप संस्कृति को समर्पित है।  इसमें फ़िल्मी खबर ,रिव्यु, इंटरव्यू, कलाकार के जीवन, गॉसिप्स, स्कूप्स, रेड कार्पेट और ट्रेंड्स को बखूभी और सही तरह से दिखाया जाता है। लहरें पहला और सबसे ज्यादा देखे जाने वाला और याद किया जाने वाला भारतीय मनोरंजन नेटवर्क है।
लहरें से मनोरंजन का साथ 1987 से है जब भारत के तत्कालीन उभरते टेलीविजन उद्योग के लिए कई फिल्म-आधारित मनोरंजन शो पेश किए। लहरें, आज डिजिटल प्लेटफॉर्म पर पूरी तरह से और हर जगह फैला हुआ है। लहरें आज युवा, अभिलाषी और ट्रेंडसेटिंग मनोरंजन उत्साही लोगों के लिए एक पसंदीदा प्लेटफार्म है।

en-IN.title: Bhoot Bangla Trailer Launch LIVE: Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Priyadarshan, Wamiqa Gabbi, Rajpal & Paresh Ji
en-IN.description:
Watch the LIVE Trailer Launch of this year's much awaited horror-comedy film BHOOT BANGLA starring Akshay Kumar, Wamiqa Gabbi, Tabu, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Manoj Joshi, Rajesh Sharma, Jisshu Sengupta, Mithila Palkar & others! Backed by the Balaji Telefilms Boss Ekta Kapoor & Directed by comedy king Priyadarshan the movie is all set to hit the silver screens on 17.04.26! Catch the full trailer launch telecast LIVE from Mumbai only on your favourite online digital destination, Lehren! #akshaykumar #bhootbangla #priyadarshan #bhootbanglatrailer #tabu #wamiqagabbi #pareshrawal #rajpalyadav #manojjoshi #bhootbanglateaser #rajeshsharma #jisshusengupta #mithilapalkar #live #balajitelefilmslimited 

About Lehren:
Lehren (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lehren) is a complete Entertainment News Network mainly devoted to Indian Films, Television, Celebrity Coverage, and Pop Culture. It covers a wide array of film news, reviews, interviews, celebrity life, gossip, scoops, red carpet, and trends. Lehren is the first and most widely viewed and recalled Indian Entertainment destination.
Lehren's engagement with Showbiz dates from 1987, when it introduced several film-based entertainment shows for India's then-emerging television industry. Lehren, today, has unparalleled reach across digital platforms and is a favorite destination for young, hip, and trendsetting entertainment enthusiasts.

लहरें (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lehren) एक संपूर्ण मनोरंजन न्यूज़ नेटवर्क है जो मुख्य रूप से भारतीय फिल्म, टेलीविजन जगत के साथ सेलिब्रिटी कवरेज और पॉप संस्कृति को समर्पित है।  इसमें फ़िल्मी खबर ,रिव्यु, इंटरव्यू, कलाकार के जीवन, गॉसिप्स, स्कूप्स, रेड कार्पेट और ट्रेंड्स को बखूभी और सही तरह से दिखाया जाता है। लहरें पहला और सबसे ज्यादा देखे जाने वाला और याद किया जाने वाला भारतीय मनोरंजन नेटवर्क है।
लहरें से मनोरंजन का साथ 1987 से है जब भारत के तत्कालीन उभरते टेलीविजन उद्योग के लिए कई फिल्म-आधारित मनोरंजन शो पेश किए। लहरें, आज डिजिटल प्लेटफॉर्म पर पूरी तरह से और हर जगह फैला हुआ है। लहरें आज युवा, अभिलाषी और ट्रेंडसेटिंग मनोरंजन उत्साही लोगों के लिए एक पसंदीदा प्लेटफार्म है।

Song Credits:
🎵 Song Title: Nas Nas Kyu Dukhei (नस नस क्यों दूखै)
🎭 Starring: Anjali Raghav & Karan Chaudhary
🎤 Singers: Kabir Singhora & Sarita Yadav
📝 Lyrics: Kabir Singhora

 📽 DoP: Munish Sharma

video credit 

ritika queen 
sharad shivhare 
Shoot with editing -patel


LYRICS: 
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

snippet.title: Thari Bolero - Harsh Mudgil , Swara Verma ( Dekh Dekh Kai Jale Padosi ) Official Song
snippet.description:
Harsh Mudgil Presents New Haryanvi Song 2026" " written , composed by Harsh Mudgil and Music Also by Harsh Mudgil. 


Follow Me On Insta-https://instagram.com/harsh__mudgil

#harshmudgil #tharibolero #terayaarmudgil 
#themudgil #ritaulirohtak 

AVAILABLE ON ALL OTHER PLATFORMS....

 Song Credits : 

Song - Thari Bolero

Singer - Harsh Mudgil
https://instagram.com/harsh__mudgil

Female Singer  - Swara Verma 

Lyrics - Harsh Mudgil 

Composer -  Harsh Mudgil

Music - Harsh Mudgil 

Mixing  - Sagar Kaushik

Mastering - Sagar Kaushik 

Recording Engineering - Sagar Kaushik

Video - Lakshay Vashishth

Digital Media - Sting Tune 

Online Promotion - Bholenath🤝🔱

Label -@Harsh Mudgil  
----------------------------------------------


Lyrics-

Thari Bolero 

F- Jha Bhi Jao Sath MaiJao
Pakki Jodi Doyaa Ki

M- Sarkaar Avaidh Bataya Kare 
Taskari Chale Un Lohya Ki

F-
Na suii tikti 100 t niche 
 
M- Bairi Dekh Aankhya N Miche

Jo Apne Aap Mai Gundey Sai
Gandya Ki Dhala Cholla Rai

F- 
Chaale Thari Bolero Paadti
Naake Or Sab Tolla Nai
Male- 
Karke Vaake Khujaa Baabe 
Paade Sabke Wholla Nai



1

F-
 kaan Pai vertue Laake Nai
 Thum Naad Pai teko Asla Nai

M- Hum Maang Firoti Lala Pai
Chutki Mai Metdya Maslya Nai

F- 
Kai Kai Mukbar Shehar Mai Sai
Tere Kitna Dum Hai Seene Mai

M- 
Kade Khatu Ji Kade Salasar
Mhari Jaale Gaadi Mhine Mai



F- Teri Ankhya Mai Mane Rum Laage 
M-  Na Na Madam Ji Bum Laage 
Mhare Aave Dudhiya Aisa 
Jo pistol Rakhe Sai Dola mai




Rap 
M- Aaye Hayee   R gori Mhare Apne Asool
F- Oye Hoe tu Role rakkhe  kyate Befizool

M-

M-Aay Haay Rai Gori Hum Paar Jaava Maar 
Banda Tohya Bhi Na Paana

F- Oee Hoee Tera Naam Chaale Itnak
Bairi Tne Jaane Har City Ala Thana

Chehre Pai Smile Pavgi 
Khi Baat Rai Misail pavgi
Jai Aaja Koi Yaara Nai Bhsad 
Call Mudgil Ki Dial Pavgi


2- F-
Tne Dekh Dekh Kai Jale Padosi
 Jalan Ke Tender Lere S

M-
Gori Chaale Gaadi Mhari
Silencor Inke Dhume Dere Sai


F- Teri Baata Mai Mane Dum Laage 
Producer Nai Kyu Kam Laage
Mai inke Lable Khoduga 
Jai aagya apne Rolla Mai

snippet.description:
Mere Naseeb Mein 💔 | Arijit Singh Style Heart Touching Sad Song | Dilshad Khaan | New Hindi Song 2026


---

Agar aapko heart touching sad love songs pasand hain, toh “Mere Naseeb Mein” by Dilshad Khaan aapke dil ko zaroor touch karega. 💔

Yeh song kismat, adhuri mohabbat aur dil ke dard ko beautifully express karta hai. Agar aapko Arijit Singh style emotional songs pasand hain toh yeh track aapko definitely pasand aayega.

Like 👍 Comment 💬 Share 🔁 aur Subscribe 🔔 zaroor karein.

snippet.title: Live Satsang पूज्य प्रेमानंद जी महाराज का आज का सत्संग | 06-04-2026 | Monday
snippet.description:
🔴 LIVE: श्री प्रेमानंद जी महाराज का आज का सत्संग | भजन, प्रवचन और कीर्तन | 06-04-2026 | Monday
🌸 आज के पावन सत्संग में आपका हार्दिक स्वागत है! 🌸
श्री प्रेमानंद जी महाराज के मधुर वचनों, भक्ति-रस भरे भजनों और कीर्तन के साथ आज का दिन बनाएँ दिव्यता और शांति से पूर्ण।
आइए डूब जाएँ श्री राधा-कृष्ण प्रेम रस और वृंदावन धाम की महिमा में।

🕉️ आज के LIVE सत्संग में क्या मिलेगा?

✨ जीवन, धर्म और अध्यात्म से जुड़े प्रश्नों के गूढ़ उत्तर
✨ श्री वृंदावन धाम की महिमा और प्रेम-रस का रहस्य
✨ भजन, कीर्तन और प्रवचन जो मन और आत्मा को शुद्ध करें
✨ आध्यात्मिक मार्गदर्शन और सरल जीवन का संदेश
✨ शांति और आनंद पाने का सच्चा मार्ग

📅 कार्यक्रम विवरण
06-04-2026 | Monday
स्थान: श्री वृंदावन धाम (LIVE)

🌼 इस सत्संग से लाभ

✅ भक्ति मार्ग की गहराई समझ पाएंगे
✅ मानसिक शांति और आत्मिक संतुलन प्राप्त होगा
✅ श्री राधा-कृष्ण के प्रति प्रगाढ़ प्रेम उत्पन्न होगा
✅ जीवन को सकारात्मक और सार्थक बनाने की प्रेरणा मिलेगी

🔔 जुड़े रहने के लिए

👉 चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करें और बेल आइकन दबाएँ
👉 रोज़ सुनें भक्ति-रस भरे भजन, प्रवचन और सत्संग
👉 अपने परिवार और मित्रों के साथ यह LIVE साझा करें

🌸 SEO Keywords

#LiveSatsang #PremanandJiMaharaj #VrindavanLive #BhajanKirtan #Pravachan #RadhaKrishnaBhakti #PremRas #VrindavanSatsang #SanatanDharma #BhaktiMarg #HinduismLive #MaharajJiDarshan #SpiritualWisdom #PathToPeace

🚩 इस दिव्य अवसर को न चूकें!
🙏 अभी LIVE जुड़ें और श्री प्रेमानंद जी महाराज के साथ अपनी आध्यात्मिक यात्रा को ऊँचाइयों तक ले जाएँ।

snippet.title: Hamsafar Ke Liye (Lyrical Video) - Alka Yagnik | Sunny Deol, Tabu | Jaal: The Trap
snippet.description:
Hamsafar Ke Liye is a melodious romantic song beautifully sung by Alka Yagnik, featuring Sunny Deol and Tabu from the film Jaal: The Trap. With its soothing tune and heartfelt emotions, this soulful track captures love, companionship, and longing, making it a memorable romantic gem from early-2000s Bollywood. ✨❤️ 

Credits: 
Singer: Alka Yagnik
Music: Anand Raj Anand
Lyrics: Sameer
Movie: Jaal The Trap
Starring: Sunny Deol, Tabu
Director: Guddu Dhanoa
Producer: Vinod Shah, Harish Shah
Label: Universal Music India

Lyrics: 

Aah aah aah, aah aah aah 
Aah aah aah aah aah aah 
Hamsafar ke liye hamsafar mil gaya 
Dil ko roka magar dil gaya dil gaya 
Rab tera shukriya is khushi ke liye 
Aur kya chaahiye zindagi ke liye 
Hamsafar ke liye hamsafar mil gaya 

Maine socha na tha pyaar ho jaayega 
Is tarha se mera chain kho jaayega 

Oh, haan… 

Maine socha na tha pyaar ho jaayega 
Is tarha se mera chain kho jaayega 
Tujhse nazrein mili dil dhadakne laga 
Teri chaahat mein paagal tadapne laga 
Maine tujhko chuna aashiqui ke liye 
Rab tera shukriya is khushi ke liye 
Aur kya chaahiye zindagi ke liye 
Hamsafar ke liye hamsafar mil gaya 

Hey hey hey hey hey 

Maine har saans pe naam tera likha 
Dhadkanon pe bhi paigaam tera likha 

Oh, haan… 

Maine har saans pe naam tera likha 
Dhadkanon pe bhi paigaam tera likha 
Teri baahon mein guzri hai jo yeh ghadi 
Hai yeh mere liye to yugon se badi 
Ishq maine kiya zindagi ke liye 
Rab tera shukriya is khushi ke liye 
Aur kya chaahiye zindagi ke liye 
Hamsafar ke liye hamsafar mil gaya 

I love you ajay, ajay ilove you, ajay ilove you ajay 
Main khushi ke maare pagal ho rahi hoo 
Mere paav havaa me pad rahe hai 
Main ud rahi hoon 
Muje girne mat dena ajay 
Mat girne dena 
Muje sambhaal lena ajay 
Ajay ilove you.

localized.title: Hamsafar Ke Liye (Lyrical Video) - Alka Yagnik | Sunny Deol, Tabu | Jaal: The Trap
localized.description:
Hamsafar Ke Liye is a melodious romantic song beautifully sung by Alka Yagnik, featuring Sunny Deol and Tabu from the film Jaal: The Trap. With its soothing tune and heartfelt emotions, this soulful track captures love, companionship, and longing, making it a memorable romantic gem from early-2000s Bollywood. ✨❤️ 

Credits: 
Singer: Alka Yagnik
Music: Anand Raj Anand
Lyrics: Sameer
Movie: Jaal The Trap
Starring: Sunny Deol, Tabu
Director: Guddu Dhanoa
Producer: Vinod Shah, Harish Shah
Label: Universal Music India

Lyrics: 

Aah aah aah, aah aah aah 
Aah aah aah aah aah aah 
Hamsafar ke liye hamsafar mil gaya 
Dil ko roka magar dil gaya dil gaya 
Rab tera shukriya is khushi ke liye 
Aur kya chaahiye zindagi ke liye 
Hamsafar ke liye hamsafar mil gaya 

Maine socha na tha pyaar ho jaayega 
Is tarha se mera chain kho jaayega 

Oh, haan… 

Maine socha na tha pyaar ho jaayega 
Is tarha se mera chain kho jaayega 
Tujhse nazrein mili dil dhadakne laga 
Teri chaahat mein paagal tadapne laga 
Maine tujhko chuna aashiqui ke liye 
Rab tera shukriya is khushi ke liye 
Aur kya chaahiye zindagi ke liye 
Hamsafar ke liye hamsafar mil gaya 

Hey hey hey hey hey 

Maine har saans pe naam tera likha 
Dhadkanon pe bhi paigaam tera likha 

Oh, haan… 

Maine har saans pe naam tera likha 
Dhadkanon pe bhi paigaam tera likha 
Teri baahon mein guzri hai jo yeh ghadi 
Hai yeh mere liye to yugon se badi 
Ishq maine kiya zindagi ke liye 
Rab tera shukriya is khushi ke liye 
Aur kya chaahiye zindagi ke liye 
Hamsafar ke liye hamsafar mil gaya 

I love you ajay, ajay ilove you, ajay ilove you ajay 
Main khushi ke maare pagal ho rahi hoo 
Mere paav havaa me pad rahe hai 
Main ud rahi hoon 
Muje girne mat dena ajay 
Mat girne dena 
Muje sambhaal lena ajay 
Ajay ilove you.

en-US.title: Hamsafar Ke Liye (Lyrical Video) - Alka Yagnik | Sunny Deol, Tabu | Jaal: The Trap
en-US.description:
Hamsafar Ke Liye is a melodious romantic song beautifully sung by Alka Yagnik, featuring Sunny Deol and Tabu from the film Jaal: The Trap. With its soothing tune and heartfelt emotions, this soulful track captures love, companionship, and longing, making it a memorable romantic gem from early-2000s Bollywood. ✨❤️

Credits:
Singer: Alka Yagnik
Music: Anand Raj Anand
Lyrics: Sameer
Movie: Jaal The Trap
Starring: Sunny Deol, Tabu
Director: Guddu Dhanoa
Producer: Vinod Shah, Harish Shah
Label: Universal Music India

Lyrics:

Aah aah aah, aah aah aah
Aah aah aah aah aah
I have found a companion for my journey
My heart was held back, but I fell in love
Lord, thank you for this happiness
What more do I need in life?
I have found a companion for my journey

I never thought I would fall in love
like this My chain will be lost.

Oh, yes…

I never thought I would fall in love.

My chain will be lost like this.
My heart started beating when I saw you.

My desire for you made me yearn like a madman.

I chose you for my love.

Thank you, God, for this happiness.

What more could I want in life?

I found a companion for my travels.

Hey hey hey hey hey

I wrote your name with every breath.

Your message even with my heartbeats.

Oh, yes…

I wrote your name with every breath.
Your message is written even on my heartbeats
This moment spent in your arms
Yes, this is greater for me than ages
I loved life for the sake of it
Thank you, God, for this happiness
What more do I need in life?
I have found a companion for my journey

I love you, Ajay, I love you, Ajay, I love you, Ajay
I am going crazy with happiness
My feet are in the air
I am soaring
Don't let me fall, Ajay
Don't let me fall
Take care of me, Ajay
Ajay I love you.

snippet.title: Raja Shivaji First Look  Hindi Teaser | Riteish D | Genelia D | Sanjay D | In Cinemas 1 May 2026
snippet.description:
For the land that forged warriors. 
For the faith that never wavered. 
For the dream of Swarajya that lived in every heart… 
With deep reverence to Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj,  we proudly unveil the first look teaser of Raja Shivaji — India’s Greatest Warrior King. 👑 
 Our King. Our Pride. Our Legacy. 🚩 
 Directed by Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh. 
#RajaShivaji In cinemas on 1st May 2026 in Marathi, Hindi & Telugu.

Jio Studios Presents
A Mumbai Film Company Production
Raja Shivaji
Directed by: Riteish Deshmukh
Produced by: Jyoti Deshpande & Genelia Deshmukh
Music: Ajay-Atul 
Cinematographer: Santosh Sivan (Asc, Isc)
Story screenplay: Ajit wadekar, Sandeep Patil, Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh
Dialogue writer: Prajakt Deshmukh
Additional Hindi dialogues: Jaideep Yadav
Editor: Urvashi Saxena
Background Score: John Stewart Eduri
Production designer: Nikhil Kovale, Apurva Bhagat, Shashank Tere
Associate Producer: Nandita Sachdev
Executive Producer: Sandeep Patil
Casting Director: Rohan Mapuskar
Sound Designer: Kunal & Parikshit
Primary Costume Designer: Rushi Sharma & Manoshi Nath
Secondary Costume Designer: Pournima Aak
Additional Wardrobe / Styling: Nafs [Rizwan Shaikh & Deeksha Sharma Khan]
Action Director: Dawid Szatarski & Manohar Verma
Choreographer: Remo D’souza
Hair-Makeup Designer: Audrey Sangma, Nitin Indulkar, Hakim Aalim & Kanta Motwani
Chief Assistant Director: Charul Patil
Director’s Assistant: Chandni Kargathra
Research Consultant: Ketan Puri
VFX Supervisor: Pushpendra Dubey & Swapnil Ambre
CG & VFX: Assemblage Entertainment
Di Studio: Prime Focus Limited
Di Colorist: Ashirwad Hadkar
Sound Mixing
Post Producer: Takshit Pradhan
Re-recording mixer:
   
Raja Shivaji, based on the life of one of India’s Greatest Warrior King – Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj, who rose against formidable powers to lay the foundation of Swarajya. Experience this grand historical spectacle on the big screen, unfolding in Marathi, Hindi, and Telugu.
 
1st May 2026
In Cinemas
A Jio Studios Release

snippet.title: 🤔​THE SECRET JOURNEY! 🚗 Chacha, Shin-chan & Nobita Leaving The City? | Mystery Story
snippet.description:
THE SECRET JOURNEY! 🚗 Chacha, Shin-chan & Nobita Leaving The City? | Mystery Story


Today, everyone is packing their bags. Chacha, Shin-chan, Nobita, and Bhabhi are all leaving the city to head back to their village. But the real question is—WHY? Is there a hidden secret waiting for them in the village? Or are they running away from something dangerous? The journey is long, the roads are mysterious, and the reason is still a huge suspense!
Watch the full video to find out the truth behind this sudden trip. Don't miss the ending because everything changes in the final minute!
In this video:
Emotional family journey to the village.
High-speed driving and mystery.
Major plot twist about why they left.
If you enjoy the story, don't forget to:
✅ Like the video
✅ Subscribe for more epic stories
✅ Comment below what you think the secret is!
#VillageMystery #StoryTime #ShinchanNobita #GamingStories #Suspense #FamilyTrip #MysteryJourney #IndianGaming #TrendingStory



Disclaimer & Credits:
This video is a unique combination of AI-enhanced storytelling and original gameplay.
The Process: I use AI technology for the creative 1-minute intro/visuals, followed by my own original gameplay and voice-over for the rest of the 10-12 minute video.
Voice & Characters: All character voices (like Shin-chan, Nobita, and Doraemon) are creatively performed by me using voice modulation and filters to enhance the storytelling.
Editing & Quality: This content is edited by me (Original Editing) and rendered in 60fps for the best viewer experience.
Fictional Content: This is a fan-made parody created for entertainment purposes only. No copyright infringement is intended

अगर आपको वीडियो पसंद आया, तो लाइक, कमेंट और सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें ताकि आपको BeamNG.Drive के और भी वीडियो मिल सकें!

snippet.description:

snippet.title: टूट जाई पलंग राजा जी | khesari lal yadav #bhojpuri song #khesari lal yadav
snippet.description:
टूट जाई पलंग राजा जी | khesari lal yadav #bhojpuri song #khesari lal yadav 


🎵 टूट जाई पलंग राजा जी | Khesari Lal Yadav | Bhojpuri Song 🎵
भोजपुरी इंडस्ट्री के सुपरस्टार खेसारी लाल यादव का मजेदार और रोमांटिक गाना "टूट जाई पलंग राजा जी" आपके लिए लेकर आए हैं। इस गाने में देसी अंदाज, शानदार म्यूजिक और जबरदस्त एक्सप्रेशन देखने को मिलता है, जो इसे और भी खास बनाता है। 💥
यह गाना हर भोजपुरी म्यूजिक लवर के दिल को छू जाएगा। अगर आपको भी ऐसे एंटरटेनिंग और फुल ऑन मस्ती वाले गाने पसंद हैं, तो इस वीडियो को जरूर देखें और अपने दोस्तों के साथ शेयर करें। ❤️
👍 वीडियो को लाइक करें
💬 कमेंट में अपनी राय दें
🔔 चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें
#khesarilalyadav #bhojpurisong #bhojpuri #trending #viralvideo #desisong #newbhojpurisong #music

snippet.title: Pehli Nazar Mein | O Jaan-E-Jaan | Race | Atif Aslam Hits | Akshaye, Bipasha & Saif Ali | Hindi Song
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Song Name : Pehli Nazar Mein
Movie Name : Race (2008)
Singer(s) - Atif Aslam
Lyrics Writer - Sameer
Music Director - Pritam

Movie Cast & Crew :
Producer : Tips Films
Director : Abbas - Mustan
Cast : Saif Ali Khan, Katrina Kaif, Bipasha Basu, Anil Kapoor, Akshaye Khanna & Sameera Reddy

Song Lyrics: 

Pehli Nazar Mein
Kaise Jaado Kar Diya
Tera Ban Baita Hai
Mera Jiya

Jaane Kya Hoga
Kya Hoga Kya Pata
Is Pal Ko Milke
Aa Jee Le Zara
Mein Hoon Yahan
Tu Hai Yahan
Meri Bahon Mein Aa
Aa Bhi Ja

O Jaan-E-Jaan
Dono Jahan
Meri Bahon Mein Aa
Bhool Ja Aa
Baby I Love U, Baby I Love You, Baby I Love You, Baby I Love You So Much
Baby I Love U
Oh I Love U
I Love U
I Love U So Much
Baby I Love U

Har Dua Mein Shamil Tera Pyaar Hai
Bin Tere Lamha Bhi Dushwar Hai
Dhadhkon Ko Tujhe Se Hi Darkar Hai
Tujhse Hai Rahtein
Tujhse Hai Chahtein
Tu Jo Mili Ek Din Mujhe
Mein Kahin Ho Gaya Lapata

O Jaan-E-Jaan
Dono Jahan
Meri Bahon Mein Aa
Bhool Ja Aa

Kar Diya Deewana Dard-E-Khash Ne
Chain Cheena Isqh Ke Ehsaas Ne
Bekhayali Di Hai Tere Pyaas Ne
Chaya Suroor Hai
Kuch To Zaroor Hai
Yeh Dooriyan
Jeene Na De
Hal Mera Tujhe Na Pata

O Jaan-E-Jaan
Dono Jahan
Meri Bahon Mein Aa
Bhool Ja Aa
Baby I Love U, I Love You

#pehlinazarmein  #atifaslam  #race  #akshayekhanna

Success doesn't happen overnight. Jaan is a song about the real hustle.
It’s a conversation between a couple where the guy finally opens up about his journey. He talks about the hard days, the sleepless nights, and everything he had to sacrifice to make a name for himself.
If you’re working hard for your dreams, this song is your anthem.

snippet.title: Rajasthan SI Exam 2025 | 2nd Paper GK & GS (6 April) | Complete Paper Solution | RAS Utkarsh
snippet.description:
Rajasthan SI Exam 2025 | 2nd Paper GK & GS (6 April) | Complete Paper Solution | RAS Utkarsh

Rajasthan Sub Inspector (SI) Exam 2025 : इस Live Session में 6 April को आयोजित 2nd Paper (GK & GS) का Complete Video Solution विस्तार से कराया जाएगा। RAS Utkarsh टीम द्वारा इस session में सभी प्रश्नों का detailed analysis किया जाएगा, जिससे आप paper का level, question pattern और GK & GS के important topics को अच्छे से समझ सकें। इस वीडियो के माध्यम से आप अपने performance का सही आंकलन कर पाएंगे और अपने expected result का भी पूर्वानुमान लगा सकेंगे। इसलिए इस session को अंत तक जरूर देखें और अधिक से अधिक साथियों के साथ शेयर करें, ताकि सभी अभ्यर्थियों को इसका लाभ मिल सके।

hi.title: Rajasthan SI Exam 2025 | 2nd Paper GK & GS (6 April) | Complete Paper Solution | RAS Utkarsh
hi.description:
Rajasthan SI Exam 2025 | 2nd Paper GK & GS (6 April) | Complete Paper Solution | RAS Utkarsh

Rajasthan Sub Inspector (SI) Exam 2025 : इस Live Session में 6 April को आयोजित 2nd Paper (GK & GS) का Complete Video Solution विस्तार से कराया जाएगा। RAS Utkarsh टीम द्वारा इस session में सभी प्रश्नों का detailed analysis किया जाएगा, जिससे आप paper का level, question pattern और GK & GS के important topics को अच्छे से समझ सकें। इस वीडियो के माध्यम से आप अपने performance का सही आंकलन कर पाएंगे और अपने expected result का भी पूर्वानुमान लगा सकेंगे। इसलिए इस session को अंत तक जरूर देखें और अधिक से अधिक साथियों के साथ शेयर करें, ताकि सभी अभ्यर्थियों को इसका लाभ मिल सके।

bn.title: Abhi Saikia, Pinki Medhi, Sens3i - Bohona (Visualizer)
bn.description:
A heart caught between riverbanks and spring winds. A promise lingers in the air: when Bohag arrives, the season of new beginnings, this love will finally become their own.

A melody of longing, hope, and the timeless magic of Assamese spring. 🌸

BOHONA

Music Production, Composition & Vocals: Abhi Saikia
Vocals: Pinky Medhi
Music Production, Mixing and Mastering: Sens3i 
Lyrics: Somiran Malay 
Guitar: Akul
Flute: Anjan Medhi 
Studio Partner: Symphony Records, Dibrugarh (Purav Gohain)

Album art and visualizer by Sameucliff

snippet.title: 1 Hour Nonstop मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम Ram Naam Jap Powerful Ram Bhajan
snippet.description:
1 Hour Nonstop Ram Dhun | मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम | Ram Naam Jap | Powerful Ram Bhajan

Song: 1 Hour Nonstop Ram Dhun | मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम | Ram Naam Jap | Powerful Ram Bhajan
Lyrics, Music & Composer:  Kuldeep Mahar
Singer : Sagar Bedardi
Editing: Lala Mothiyapura
Music Label : Bhakti Records

Presenting this beautiful and peaceful Ram Dhun to fill your mind with positive energy and devotion to Lord Ram.

यह हृदय को छूने वाला भजन *"मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम" आपके जीवन के सभी कष्टों को दूर करेगा। इस **नॉनस्टॉप राम नाम जाप को सुनकर सुबह की शुरुआत करें या रात को शांति प्राप्त करें।

Lyrics - 

मेरे तन में भी राम, मेरे मन में भी राम
मेरे कण कण में राम, मेरे मन मन में राम
रोम रोम में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे

जैसे चंदा में राम, जैसे सूरज में राम
जैसे चंदा में राम, जैसे सूरज में राम
अंबर तारों में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे

जैसे सीता के राम, जैसे राधा के श्याम
जैसे सीता के राम, जैसे राधा के श्याम
नर नारी में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे

जैसे शबरी के राम, जैसे मीरा के श्याम
जैसे शबरी के राम, जैसे मीरा के श्याम
पत्ते पत्ते में समाया तेरा नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे
हाय मेरी साँसों में तेरा ही नाम रे




Nonstop Ram Dhun Continuous chanting for high focus and meditation.
Ram Naam Jap Best way to purify your thoughts.
Mere Tan Mein Bhi Ram Mere Mann Mein Bhi Ram The powerful lyric that inspires devotion.
Ram Siya Ram The ultimate mantra for peace and happiness.

📌 Keywords: Ram Dhun 2025, Ram Naam Jap Bhajan, मेरे तन में भी राम मेरे मन में भी राम, Shri Ram Bhajan, Ram Devotional Song, Ram Mantra Jap, Ram Naam Stotra, Shri Ram Ka Bhajan, Bajao Bhakti, 1 Hour Ram Dhun, Nonstop Ram Dhun

#ramdhun #ramnaam #rambhajan #bhajan #hindibhajan

snippet.description:
Welcome to ORION CONQUEST SERIES — one of India’s biggest competitive BGMI esports tournaments.

🏆 STAGE: Group Stage – Day 1
📅 DATE: 6th April 2026
⏰ TIME: 12:30 PM onwards
📍 FORMAT: Online

🏆 Group A Teams

iQOO Soul
K9 Esports 
Gods Reign
iQOO 8Bit
Team Ax
Welt Esports 
Team Shadow
Troy Tamilian Esports 
The Knight Mobs
Zutsu Gaming
Team Swarajya 
Team Cypher
Karunaadu Esports 
Team Earny
BeLike Esports 
OSH Karmic

MATCH MAP ORDER
🔹 Rondo
🔹 Erangel
🔹 Miramar
🔹 Erangel
🔹 Miramar
🔹 Erangel

Welcome to Orion Esports, where passion meets precision in the world of competitive gaming. Join us on this adrenaline-fueled journey as we carve our mark in the esports realm, fearlessly pushing boundaries and championing excellence.
Our mission is clear: to empower and elevate esports enthusiasts, providing a platform that celebrates skill, strategy, and unbridled determination.

Orion Esports is a competitive gaming organization dedicated to excellence, innovation, and community within the global esports scene. Founded with a passion for gaming and a commitment to growth, Welt Esports brings together top-tier talent, strategic minds, and a shared vision to dominate the digital battlefield.

Teri Aankhon Ka Kajal, 90s style deep love romantic Hindi song hai jo dil ke sabse gehre jazbaat ko bayan karta hai. Ye gana un logon ke liye hai jo true love, one-side love, pure emotions aur soulful romance ko mehsoos karte hain. Is gaane me wahi purana Bollywood 90s ka magic hai — jahan mohabbat shor nahi karti, balki khamoshi me bhi bol jaati hai ❤️

Agar aapko 90s romantic songs, deep love songs, heart touching Hindi songs aur emotional Bollywood love music pasand hai, to ye song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jaayega.
Is gaane ka har lafz pyaar, dard aur sukoon ko ek saath mehsoos karata hai.

Tere Naam Mein Mera Sukoon un yaadon ko wapas le aata hai jab gaane sirf sunne ke liye nahi, balki mehsoos karne ke liye bane hote the.
Ye gana un logon ke liye hai:

Jo saccha pyaar karte hain

Jo aaj bhi 90s Bollywood ke deewane hain

Jo romantic aur soulful songs sunna pasand karte hain

Jo apni feelings shabdon me nahi keh paate


🎶 Song Feel:
Romantic | Emotional | Deep Love | 90s Bollywood Vibes

90s Hindi Songs lovers, Romantic reels, Love status videos, Emotional edits, Bollywood nostalgic songs fans
